name: Mereologic Aggregator
name_jp: メレオロジック・アグリゲーター
desc:
2+ Level 9 monsters
If this card is Xyz Summoned: You can send 1 monster from your Extra Deck to the GY. You can target monsters in your GY, up to the number of materials this card has; detach materials from this card equal to the number of those targets in the GY, and if you do, attach those targets to this card. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 face-up card on the field; negate its effects until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Mereologic Aggregator" once per turn.
mnst_eff:
2+ Level 9 monsters
If this card is Xyz Summoned: You can send 1 monster from your Extra Deck to the GY. You can target monsters in your GY, up to the number of materials this card has; detach materials from this card equal to the number of those targets in the GY, and if you do, attach those targets to this card. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 face-up card on the field; negate its effects until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Mereologic Aggregator" once per turn.
eff:
2+ Level 9 monsters
If this card is Xyz Summoned: You can send 1 monster from your Extra Deck to the GY. You can target monsters in your GY, up to the number of materials this card has; detach materials from this card equal to the number of those targets in the GY, and if you do, attach those targets to this card. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 face-up card on the field; negate its effects until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Mereologic Aggregator" once per turn.

action: Sends from your Extra Deck to your Graveyard
Detaches multiple Xyz Materials for effect
Attaches from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of Spell Cards
Negates the effects of Trap Cards
Does not have effects which detach Xyz Materials for cost
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
